expectations.text: Handles login, workspace creation, and profile setup since user didn't say they're already set up
expectations.evidence: Steps 1-4: verify-state.sh, clams login, workspaces create, profiles create, context set.

expectations.text: Creates an onchain source (Electrum or Esplora) for the XPub connection even though user didn't mention one
expectations.evidence: Step 7: `clams onchain create --label blockstream --kind Esplora --url https://blockstream.info/api --select`

expectations.text: Creates XPub connection with correct configuration including the user's xpub
expectations.evidence: Step 8: Full config with xpub, bech32, gap_limit 20, wallet_first_tx_block_height 1, bitcoin network.

expectations.text: Creates LND connection with LNC transport and the user's pairing phrase
Creates Phoenix connection and imports the CSV file
expectations.evidence: Step 10: `--kind Phoenix`, Step 12: `clams connections import --label phoenix --input-format csv --file ~/Downloads/phoenix-export.csv`

expectations.text: Syncs connections (individually or with --all) after creating them
expectations.evidence: Steps 11: syncs coldcard and lnd-node individually, also shows `--all` alternative.

expectations.text: Runs clams journals process after syncing
Shows portfolio summary with USD fiat valuation (requires rate sync and fiat currency config)
expectations.evidence: Step 5: profiles set --fiat-currency USD, Step 6: rates sync, Step 15: portfolio-summary --format plain.
